name: io.github.openwilds/studio-mcp
title: Open Wilds Studio
description: MCP server for Open Wilds Studio workspaces, asset generation, terrain assets, sprites, and maps.

environmentVariables.name: OPEN_WILDS_STUDIO_CONVEX_URL
environmentVariables.description: Convex deployment URL for Open Wilds Studio.

environmentVariables.name: OPEN_WILDS_STUDIO_URL
environmentVariables.description: Studio web app URL used by studio_login_browser. Defaults to http://127.0.0.1:5173/studio for local development.

environmentVariables.name: OPEN_WILDS_STUDIO_AUTH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional Convex Auth JWT. Users can also authenticate with the studio_login_browser tool.

environmentVariables.name: OPEN_WILDS_STUDIO_MCP_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Optional directory root for relative file paths passed to upload/register tools. Defaults to the client's current working directory.
